The test passes immediately because the existing implementation already handles 7 runes correctly: 7 × 25 = 175 base, 175 + 17.5 + 5 = 197.5 → ceil → 198.

Let me compute: base = 7 × 25 = 175. premium = ceil(175 + 175*0.1 + 5) = ceil(175 + 17.5 + 5) = ceil(197.5) = 198. Match.
